strengths: Genuine distributed-systems depth: production experience with high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby, plus event-driven architecture in GISCollective
Emerging agentic-AI tooling exposure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directionally relevant to the role
Broad polyglot, full-stack background spanning backend, infrastructure, mobile, and embedded systems, demonstrating adaptability across technical domains
concerns: No executive or people-leadership experience at any point in career; all roles are individual-contributor (Senior/Staff Developer), with no evidence of team scaling, hiring, or building technical leadership layers
Zero fintech-domain exposure: no credit systems, payment flows, risk modeling, or regulated-financial-environment experience anywhere in the resume
Agentic-AI work is recent, junior in scope, and tooling-level rather than the production multi-agent system design and operation the role explicitly requires at an architectural and strategic level
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable and technically broad individual contributor with real distributed-systems experience and nascent exposure to agentic-AI tooling, but the CTO role demands executive leadership, proven team scaling from 10 to 30+ engineers, fintech-infrastructure fluency, and production ownership of multi-agent AI systems — none of which are evidenced in his career history; the gap between his current seniority level and the role's requirements is substantial.
